ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm owner */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the farm in hectares */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* General soil type of the farm */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Year the farm was established */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the farm was registered with the platform */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the farm (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "soil_analysis_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of soil analysis (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farms_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES farm_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farm_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farm owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the farm owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the farm owner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the owner registered with the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the owner is active */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subareas" (
  "subarea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subarea */,
  "subarea_name" TEXT /* Name of the subarea */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm the subarea belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subarea */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the subarea in hectares */,
  "irrigation" INTEGER /* Annual irrigation amount in millimeters */,
  "rotation_years" INTEGER /* Number of years in the crop rotation cycle */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the subarea in meters */,
  "topography" TEXT /* Description of the subarea's topography (e.g., flat, hilly) */,
  "soil_analysis_last_date" TEXT /* Date of the last soil analysis */,
  "irrigation_system_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation system used (e.g., sprinkler, drip, surface) */,
  "soil_health_index" REAL /* A composite index of soil health */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subarea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subareas_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_properties" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil property record */,
  "subarea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subarea the soil properties belong to */,
  "t_clay" REAL /* Percentage of clay in the soil */,
  "t_sand" REAL /* Percentage of sand in the soil */,
  "t_silt" REAL /* Percentage of silt in the soil */,
  "t_oc" REAL /* Organic carbon content in the soil */,
  "t_bulk" REAL /* Bulk density of the soil */,
  "t_ph" REAL /* pH of the soil */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the soil */,
  "nitrogen_content" REAL /* Nitrogen content in the soil */,
  "phosphorus_content" REAL /* Phosphorus content in the soil */,
  "potassium_content" REAL /* Potassium content in the soil */,
  "soil_organic_matter" REAL /* Organic matter content in the soil */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the soil */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Moisture content in the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_properties_subarea_id FOREIGN KEY ("subarea_id") REFERENCES subareas ("subarea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_records" (
  "irrigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation record */,
  "subarea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subarea being irrigated */,
  "irrigation_date" TEXT /* Date of the irrigation */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of water applied in millimeters */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation (e.g., sprinkler, drip) */,
  "irrigation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the irrigation in hours */,
  "irrigation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of irrigation (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water used for irrigation (e.g., well, river) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irrigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_records_subarea_id FOREIGN KEY ("subarea_id") REFERENCES subareas ("subarea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_rotation" (
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop rotation record */,
  "subarea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subarea the crop is planted in */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crop rotation cycle */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the crop was planted */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date the crop was harvested */,
  "crop_yield" REAL /* Estimated yield of the crop in tons per hectare */,
  "fertilizer_used" TEXT /* Type and amount of fertilizer used */,
  "pesticide_used" TEXT /* Type and amount of pesticide used */,
  "crop_description" TEXT /* Description of the crop (e.g., variety, strain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_rotation_subarea_id FOREIGN KEY ("subarea_id") REFERENCES subareas ("subarea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil sample */,
  "subarea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subarea the sample was taken from */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was taken */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab that tested the sample */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the soil test (e.g., nutrient levels, pH) */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was taken in centimeters */,
  "soil_temperature_at_sampling" REAL /* Temperature of the soil at the time of sampling */,
  "soil_moisture_at_sampling" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil at the time of sampling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_subarea_id FOREIGN KEY ("subarea_id") REFERENCES subareas ("subarea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lab */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the lab */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the lab (e.g., ISO 17025) */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the lab (e.g., soil, water, plant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, agronomist, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered with the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "subarea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subarea being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_subarea_id FOREIGN KEY ("subarea_id") REFERENCES subareas ("subarea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., tractor, irrigation system) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was acquired */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, under repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment usage record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used */,
  "subarea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subarea where the equipment was used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was used */,
  "hours_used" REAL /* Number of hours the equipment was used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who used the equipment */,
  "operation_description" TEXT /* Description of the operation (e.g., plowing, planting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_subarea_id FOREIGN KEY ("subarea_id") REFERENCES subareas ("subarea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "subarea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subarea the weather data is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "sunlight_duration" REAL /* Duration of sunlight in hours */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., north, south) */,
  "air_pressure" REAL /* Air pressure in millibars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_subarea_id FOREIGN KEY ("subarea_id") REFERENCES subareas ("subarea_id")
)
